task_objective: Add missing graphs and correlations to YData-like theme
design_decisions: Ported NullityMatrix and CorrelationMatrixComponent from the default theme to ydata-like theme.
Integrated the missing values heatmap and matrix into the MissingValuesSection.
Added a dedicated CorrelationsSection that supports multiple correlation types (Pearson, etc.) via tabs.
Updated the single-page navigation to dynamically include 'Correlations' and 'Missing values' links when data is available.
results: YData-like theme now has functional parity with the default theme regarding missing values and correlations visualization.
